title: The Grand Line Reveals Its Monsters
description: On pages 8–10, the grand line reveals its monsters as the crew reaches Reverse Mountain and is dragged into the impossible currents that lead to the Grand Line.
scene: The Grand Line Reveals Its Monsters. The crew reaches Reverse Mountain and is dragged into the impossible currents that lead to the Grand Line. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A... alright... as soon as this thing dives back down into the sea, start rowing your arms off, got it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghh! A giant frog is jumping this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: oh thank God... we're back in the storm now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now do you understand why we have to use the entrance?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We really are going to climb up the mountain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You still going on about that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It must be due to the sea currents.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If strong currents from each of the four seas,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: were to all head towards that mountain...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the grand line reveals its monsters. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
